StructurePhase.Reference: Fritsch V., Bobev S., Thompson J.D., Sarrao J.L., J. Alloys Compd., v388 p28-33 (2005)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N3O4P6. LPF Collection Code: 1908175. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS: La (ingot),Ni (pieces),Si (lumps). COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted, heated at 1373 K for 24 h, cooled at a rate of 5 K h-1 to 1123 K, maintained for 48 h;cooled at a rate of 5 K h-1 to 923 K. CRUCIBLE: alumina crucible in sealed evacuated glass tube.THERMALTREATMENT: crystals grown by flux method, flux Sn. Article Title: Antiferromagnetic order in Ce3Ni2+xSi8-x (x≅ 1). Wyckoff Sequence: j3 i3 a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Wu H., Hartman M.R., Udovic T.J., Rush J.J., Zhou W., Bowman R.C. Jr., Vajo J.J., Acta Crystallogr., Sect. B: Struct. Sci., v63 p63-68 (2007)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1622696. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: milled, heated at 773 K for 2-3 h, deuterated at 723 K and 0.0007 GPa of D2. Sample annealed at 723 K for 8-9 d. Article Title: Structure of the novel ternary hydrides Li4Tt2D (Tt= Si and Ge). Minor Warning: Only profile R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Pani M., Manfrinetti P., Provino A., Yuan F., Mozharivskyj Y.A., Morozkin A.V., Knotko A.V., Garshev A.V., Yapaskurt V.O., Isnard O., J. Solid State Chem., v210 p45 (2014)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1640102. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS: La,Ni,Si. COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon.THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 1070 K for 200 d, quenched. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: Original Max Intensity 999.0 < 1000.0. Article Title: New tetragonal derivatives of cubic NaZn13-type structure: RNi6Si6 compounds, crystal structure and magnetic ordering (R= Y, La, Ce, Sm, Gd-Yb). Temperature of Data Collection: 298 K. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: n m4 b a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
